code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
mut best: Int = 0
mut best_abs: Int = 0
mut found = false
mut i = 0
while i < tokens.len()
  let tok = match tokens.get(i)
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = match string.parse_int(tok)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  let a = if n < 0
    -n
  else
    n
  end
  if not found
    best = n
    best_abs = a
    found = true
  else
    if a < best_abs
      best = n
      best_abs = a
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println("min_abs=#{best}")
